info.name: LearningFun API – Complete Test Suite
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for LearningFun Autism Support Platform.
Base URL: http://localhost:5000

Run order:
1. Parent Register  → saves parent_token + child_id
2. Parent Login     → refreshes parent_token
3. Admin Login      → saves admin_token
4. Run remaining requests in order

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Sara Ahmed",
  "email": "sara.ahmed@example.com",
  "password": "pass1234",
  "kidname": "Ali Ahmed",

}
